svg.title: Mayo Clinic Scheduling Assistant — System Architecture

g.text: Single-page widget served from Vercel (index.html, ~1900 LOC)
Most patients can request an appointment
online or by phone — no referral needed.
Hi, I'm the Mayo Assistant. I can
How do I make an appointment?
"*" by default · comma list in prod
▸ Core rules (no medical advice, no booking, US-only)
▸ Language rule appended when ES is active
▸ No PHI, no booking, no diagnosis
